data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Time-to-complete and abandonment checkpoints', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence of these checkpoints. The linked use case mentions the need for these checkpoints, but there are no specific details or evidence that demonstrate their implementation or coverage. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of time-to-complete and abandonment checkpoints.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for time-to-complete and abandonment checkpoints
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of time-to-complete and abandonment checkpoints.
